skill.summary: 聪明钱追踪器 - 追踪专业机构/大户链上操作，复制交易信号，DeFi 巨鲸动向分析。每次调用自动扣费 0.001 USDT

latestVersion.changelog:
Initial release of Smart Money Tracker.

- Track professional institutions and whale wallets on-chain.
- Real-time notifications for portfolio changes and large transfers.
- Copy trading signals with build/open/close position alerts.
- Analyze token flows, whale movements, and gas usage.
- Each use charges 0.001 USDT automatically.
- Supports commands for tracking, signals, and portfolio queries.
